records.question: How many albums are in the catalog?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album

records.question: How many tracks are there in total?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track

records.question: How many customers do we have?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer

records.question: List the names of all genres.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Genre
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM Genre

records.question: List all media types.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM MediaType
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM MediaType

records.question: Which customers are from Germany?
records.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Germany'
records.pred_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Germany'

records.question: List the customers from Brazil.
records.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Brazil'
records.pred_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Brazil'

records.question: What is the average track length in milliseconds?
records.gold_sql: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) FROM Track
records.pred_sql: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) FROM Track

records.question: What is the total revenue across all invoices?
records.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice
records.pred_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice

records.question: What is the most expensive track price?
records.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(UnitPrice) FROM Track
records.pred_sql: SELECT UnitPrice FROM Track ORDER BY UnitPrice DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: List all album titles by the artist AC/DC.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Title FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Artist.Name = 'AC/DC'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Artist.Name = 'AC/DC'

records.question: Which artists have the genre Jazz in their catalog?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId JOIN Track ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Jazz'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId JOIN Track ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Jazz'

records.question: List the names of tracks in the album 'Let There Be Rock'.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Let There Be Rock'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Let There Be Rock'

records.question: How many customers are in each country?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) FROM Customer GROUP BY Country
records.pred_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY customer_count DESC

records.question: How many tracks does each genre have?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, COUNT(*) FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name
records.pred_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, COUNT(Track.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Genre LEFT JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name

records.question: What is the total revenue per country?
records.gold_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry
records.pred_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) AS TotalRevenue FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry

records.question: Who are the top 5 customers by total spending?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS total FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS TotalSpending FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 5

records.question: What are the 5 longest tracks?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 5

records.question: Which 3 countries have the most customers, and how many customers does each have?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS n FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 3

records.question: Which artist has the most albums?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY COUNT(Album.AlbumId) DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: How many invoices were issued in 2010?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2010'
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2010'

records.question: What is the total revenue for the year 2011?
records.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2011'
records.pred_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2011'

records.question: Total revenue per genre.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS revenue FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine ON InvoiceLine.TrackId = Track.TrackId GROUP BY Genre.Name
records.pred_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS TotalRevenue FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId GROUP BY Genre.Name

records.question: Which employee has the highest total sales?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Employee.FirstName, Employee.LastName FROM Employee JOIN Customer ON Customer.SupportRepId = Employee.EmployeeId JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId GROUP BY Employee.EmployeeId ORDER BY SUM(Invoice.Total) DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT Employee.FirstName, Employee.LastName FROM Employee JOIN Customer ON Employee.EmployeeId = Customer.SupportRepId JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Employee.EmployeeId ORDER BY SUM(Invoice.Total) DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: List the distinct tracks in the playlist '90’s Music'.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN PlaylistTrack ON PlaylistTrack.TrackId = Track.TrackId JOIN Playlist ON Playlist.PlaylistId = PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId WHERE Playlist.Name = '90’s Music'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN PlaylistTrack ON Track.TrackId = PlaylistTrack.TrackId JOIN Playlist ON PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId = Playlist.PlaylistId WHERE Playlist.Name = '90’s Music'

records.question: What is the average invoice total per country?
records.gold_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, AVG(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry
records.pred_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, AVG(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry

records.question: Which countries have more than 5 customers?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Country FROM Customer GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM Customer WHERE Country IN (SELECT Country FROM Customer GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*) > 5)

records.question: Which artists have more than 3 albums?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(Album.AlbumId) > 3

records.question: Which tracks belong to the Rock genre?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Rock'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Rock'

records.question: List all playlists.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Playlist
records.pred_sql: SELECT Name FROM Playlist

records.question: Which employees are based in Calgary?
records.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Employee WHERE City = 'Calgary'
records.pred_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Employee WHERE City = 'Calgary'

records.question: List the invoice IDs and totals for invoices billed to the city of Paris.
records.gold_sql: SELECT InvoiceId, Total FROM Invoice WHERE BillingCity = 'Paris'
records.pred_sql: SELECT InvoiceId, Total FROM Invoice WHERE BillingCity = 'Paris'

records.question: How many employees report to nobody (i.e., have no manager)?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee WHERE ReportsTo IS NULL
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee WHERE ReportsTo IS NULL

records.question: What is the minimum track price?
records.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(UnitPrice) FROM Track
records.pred_sql: SELECT MIN(UnitPrice) FROM Track

records.question: List the genres of tracks on the album 'Restless and Wild'.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Restless and Wild'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Restless and Wild'

records.question: Which artist made the album 'Big Ones'?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Album.Title = 'Big Ones'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Artist.ArtistId = Album.ArtistId WHERE Album.Title = 'Big Ones'

records.question: Which 3 genres have the most tracks?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.GenreId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name ORDER BY COUNT(Track.TrackId) DESC LIMIT 3

records.question: Which customer made the largest single invoice?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId ORDER BY Invoice.Total DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId ORDER BY Invoice.Total DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: Top 10 longest albums by total track duration.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album JOIN Track ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId GROUP BY Album.AlbumId ORDER BY SUM(Track.Milliseconds) DESC LIMIT 10
records.pred_sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album JOIN Track ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId GROUP BY Album.AlbumId ORDER BY SUM(Track.Milliseconds) DESC LIMIT 10

records.question: For each customer, list their first name, last name, and how many invoices they have.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, COUNT(Invoice.InvoiceId) FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId
records.pred_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, COUNT(Invoice.InvoiceId) AS InvoiceCount FROM Customer LEFT JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId, Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName

records.question: Total revenue for January 2010.
records.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) = '2010-01'
records.pred_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) = '2010-01'

records.question: How many invoices were issued in the second quarter of 2012?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) BETWEEN '2012-04' AND '2012-06'
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice WHERE InvoiceDate BETWEEN '2012-04-01' AND '2012-06-30'

records.question: Which genres have at least 100 tracks?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.GenreId HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Genre.GenreId = Track.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.GenreId HAVING COUNT(Track.TrackId) >= 100

records.question: Which customers have spent more than 40 dollars in total?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId HAVING SUM(Invoice.Total) > 40
records.pred_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId HAVING SUM(Invoice.Total) > 40

records.question: What is the total revenue for the country Germany?
records.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE BillingCountry = 'Germany'
records.pred_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE BillingCountry = 'Germany'

records.question: Which media types are used by tracks in the Pop genre?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MediaType.Name FROM MediaType JOIN Track ON Track.MediaTypeId = MediaType.MediaTypeId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Pop'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MediaType.Name FROM MediaType JOIN Track ON MediaType.MediaTypeId = Track.MediaTypeId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Pop'

records.question: Which customers bought tracks from the album 'Greatest Hits'?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId JOIN InvoiceLine ON InvoiceLine.InvoiceId = Invoice.InvoiceId JOIN Track ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Greatest Hits'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId JOIN InvoiceLine ON Invoice.InvoiceId = InvoiceLine.InvoiceId JOIN Track ON InvoiceLine.TrackId = Track.TrackId JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Greatest Hits'

records.question: List the tracks that cost more than 1 dollar.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE UnitPrice > 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE UnitPrice > 1.00

records.question: What fraction of tracks belong to the Rock genre?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Genre.Name = 'Rock' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track) FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Rock'

records.question: Average track length per genre.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, AVG(Track.Milliseconds) FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name
records.pred_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, AVG(Track.Milliseconds) AS AverageLength FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name

records.question: Top 5 cities by total revenue.
records.gold_sql: SELECT BillingCity FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCity ORDER BY SUM(Total) DESC LIMIT 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT BillingCity FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCity ORDER BY SUM(Total) DESC LIMIT 5

records.question: What are the distinct billing countries from invoices?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT BillingCountry FROM Invoice
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT BillingCountry FROM Invoice

records.question: List the albums that have zero tracks linked to them.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Title FROM Album WHERE AlbumId NOT IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM Track WHERE AlbumId IS NOT NULL)
records.pred_sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album LEFT JOIN Track ON Album.AlbumId = Track.AlbumId WHERE Track.TrackId IS NULL

records.question: Which customers have never made a purchase?
records.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE CustomerId NOT IN (SELECT CustomerId FROM Invoice)
records.pred_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE CustomerId NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT CustomerId FROM Invoice)

records.question: Names of tracks composed by Angus Young.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE Composer LIKE '%Angus Young%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Track.Name FROM Track WHERE Composer LIKE '%Angus Young%'

records.question: How many distinct genres are represented in the catalog?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GenreId) FROM Track
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GenreId) FROM Genre

records.question: Which playlists contain the track 'Eruption'?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Playlist.Name FROM Playlist JOIN PlaylistTrack ON PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId = Playlist.PlaylistId JOIN Track ON Track.TrackId = PlaylistTrack.TrackId WHERE Track.Name = 'Eruption'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Playlist.Name FROM Playlist JOIN PlaylistTrack ON Playlist.PlaylistId = PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId JOIN Track ON PlaylistTrack.TrackId = Track.TrackId WHERE Track.Name = 'Eruption'

records.question: Which is the cheapest track in the catalog?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY UnitPrice ASC, TrackId ASC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY UnitPrice ASC LIMIT 1

records.question: How many tracks does the album 'Use Your Illusion I' have?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Use Your Illusion I'
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE AlbumId = (SELECT AlbumId FROM Album WHERE Title = 'Use Your Illusion I')

records.question: Number of invoices per year.
records.gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS year, COUNT(*) FROM Invoice GROUP BY year
records.pred_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS year, COUNT(*) AS invoice_count FROM Invoice GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
